notes: Tier 1 is sufficient for the committed lightweight importer, reconciliation, delivery-planning, execution-prep, staging, and package-contract checks for r2n-test-2.
Tier 2 stays local-only so the private OMO media tree and large companions do not become part of normal repo verification.
expected-lightweight.json and expected-local-private.json are now sample-backed truth.
The guarded private-media pass proves richer WAV/BWF/iXML metadata and stronger candidate rationale, but not a confident camera-to-recorder relink.
